purpose: Gamify public auditing with small repo-native drills and deterministic scoring.

drills.title: Find the canonical public root
drills.task: Open the public audit locator and identify the root repository and project identity.
drills.green_condition: Auditor finds jsonwisdom/JOY and jaywisdom.base.eth without guessing.

drills.title: Run the one-command verifier
drills.task: Run python3 tools/verify-this-repo.py --json from the repo root.
drills.green_condition: Script exits 0 and prints status PASS.

drills.title: Inspect JSON metadata
drills.task: Open metadata and schemas folders and confirm JSON files parse.
drills.green_condition: All checked JSON files are valid and have clear purpose fields or schema titles.

drills.title: Leave a public audit receipt
drills.task: Open a GitHub issue using the public audit template.
drills.green_condition: Issue includes path reviewed, result, and suggested next fix.

drills.title: Separate GREEN from YELLOW
drills.task: Find one repo-native receipt and one pending external anchor lane.
drills.green_condition: Auditor does not mark pending anchors as verified.

score_bands.0_39: RED: visitor bounced or could not verify
score_bands.90_100: DEEP_GREEN: auditor ran verifier and left a receipt
